parityMeta.describes: CC-1 weeklyCoachActionEngine вАФ FUNCTION-LEVEL parity for recommendExercisesForMuscleGap (src/engines/weeklyCoachActionEngine.ts:77). Each case echoes muscleId + the ExerciseRecommendationContext (always an EXPLICIT exerciseLibrary so the EXERCISE_KNOWLEDGE_OVERRIDES default-library fallback at ts:81 is never hit вАФ deferred golden-neutral) and the REAL engine output. Cases pin: contribution sources (muscleContribution map ts:57 truthy, primaryMuscles=1 ts:58, secondaryMuscles=0.5 ts:59, muscle===id ts:60, no-match filtered ts:87); primary/secondary/avoid priority (fatigueCost high / heavy-feedback / low-adherence вЖТ secondary ts:102; restricted ts:90/98 + pain-risk ts:91/98 вЖТ avoid); the reason chains (иГљзЫіжО•и°•еЕЕ ts:103, зЦ≤еК≥жИРжЬђиЊГдљО ts:104, зЦ≤еК≥жИРжЬђиЊГйЂШ ts:105, heavy ts:106, low-adherence ts:107, restricted/pain ts:100) including the empty-reasons fallback еПѓдЄЇXжПРдЊЫиЃ≠зїГйЗП (ts:113, reached by a non-standard fatigueCost so no fatigue reason fires); the STABLE sort priorityOrderвЖТfatigueScoreвЖТcontribution DESC (ts:120-128); and the empty-library [] edge. The Swift WeeklyCoachActionEngine.recommendExercisesForMuscleGap re-runs the SAME builder over each echoed input and COMPUTE-ASSERTs the ordered list (exerciseId/label/reason/fatigueCost/priority) == golden `result`, case-by-case.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: No clock вАФ recommendExercisesForMuscleGap is PURE (no new Date / Date.now / Math.random). Synthetic exercise ids + Chinese muscle names; no email/token/userId/deviceLabel. Library keys are authored in ascending code-point order so the TS Object.entries iteration matches the Swift JSON-decode key order (which sorts keys on ingest), making the stable tie-break order identical on both ends.

cases.label: primary/secondary ordering + reason chains вАФ low-fatigue high-contribution first, high-fatigue last; иГљзЫіжО•и°•еЕЕ only when contribution>=0.9 && !high
pain-risk substitute вЖТ avoid (иѓ•еК®дљЬињСжЬЯжЬЙйЗНе§НдЄНйАВиЃ∞ељХгАВ); watch is NOT a risk вЖТ stays primary
heavy-feedback + low-adherence both вЖТ secondary, with their reason lines; equal sort keys keep iteration order
contribution sources (muscle field / primary / secondary) + no-match filtered + empty-reasons fallback (еПѓдЄЇXжПРдЊЫиЃ≠зїГйЗПгАВ via non-standard fatigueCost)
explicit empty library вЖТ [] (no fallback; {} is truthy in TS)
